headline: CF Industries Holdings Inc. (NYSE:CF) Scores Strong on Quality Investing Screen with EBIT Growth and High ROIC
summary: Discover how CF Industries (NYSE:CF) passes a rigorous quality investing screen with 30% EBIT growth, 24% ROIC, strong debt management, and low valuation—despite flat revenue.
